name: Siros ID
description: A personal identity document issued by the Siros Foundation.

display.name: Siros ID
display.description: Personal identity document issued by the Siros Foundation.

display.label: First name
display.description: Current first name(s), including middle name(s) if applicable.

display.label: Nationality
display.description: Country or countries of nationality (two-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code).

display.label: Sex
display.description: Recorded sex using ISO 5218 codes (1 = male, 2 = female, 0 = not known, 9 = not applicable).

display.label: Portrait
display.description: Portrait photograph of the document holder.

display.label: Document number
display.description: Unique identifier of the identity document.

display.label: Issuing country
display.description: Country where the document was issued (two-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code).

display.label: Expiry date
display.description: End date of the document's validity.
